description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named artifacts that runs on push to master branch or tags, pull requests to master, and workflow dispatch. The workflow should have a job for Windows with a matrix of Win32 and x64 configurations. For each configuration, it should set up vcpkg and NuGet, configure the build with CMake, build the project, package it with CPack, upload the package as an artifact, extract the version number from the ref, and create a release if the workflow was triggered by a tag push.
